scripts.preview: nuxt build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.deploy: nuxt build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=ielts-platform
scripts.d1:seed: npm run d1:seed-gen && wrangler d1 execute ielts-db --remote --file=./data/seed.sql
scripts.d1:seed:local: npm run d1:seed-gen && wrangler d1 execute ielts-db --local --file=./data/seed.sql
scripts.d1:seed:cambridge17: npm run d1:seed:cambridge17-gen && wrangler d1 execute ielts-db --remote --file=./data/cambridge17-seed.sql
scripts.d1:seed:cambridge17:local: npm run d1:seed:cambridge17-gen && wrangler d1 execute ielts-db --local --file=./data/cambridge17-seed.sql
scripts.d1:seed:reading: npm run d1:seed:reading-gen && wrangler d1 execute ielts-db --remote --file=./data/reading-seed.sql
scripts.d1:seed:reading:local: npm run d1:seed:reading-gen && wrangler d1 execute ielts-db --local --file=./data/reading-seed.sql
scripts.d1:reset: npm run d1:schema && npm run d1:seed
